message:
fix(fnp-python): nan_to_num preserves dtype + conformance tests

Bug: nan_to_num was using extract_numeric_array which always
converts float32 to float64. Now uses extract_precise_numeric_array
which preserves the original dtype.

Also adds conformance_nan_to_num_clip.rs with 12 tests covering:
- nan_to_num: default, custom nan, custom inf, all params, dtype
- clip: basic, nan/inf handling, broadcast bounds, dtype preservation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
